## Runtime.Session.IFillingSessionMap type

Map of filling editing sessions keyed by slot ID. Used by confection editing sessions to manage filling scaling.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type IFillingSessionMap = Map<SlotId, import('./editingSession').EditingSession>;
```
**References:** [SlotId](./ts-chocolate.slotid.md)
